brief: DTMMax: kirish oqimi xatolari + dizayn/brend tozalash

goals.title: AdminLogin desync
goals.evidence: authStore clearSession() (redirect'siz) + AdminLogin'da ishlatildi; logout() emas chunki u '/'ga redirect qiladi

goals.title: Brend rang
goals.evidence: kelviq.css light --brand/--warning/grad #E0531F→#F15A24; landing.css --lp-accent+grad; Landing.tsx accent+accentGrad; index.css :root light Amber→#F15A24 (dark ham), stale komment tuzatildi

goals.title: Font+token
goals.objective: Inter olib tashlash, success-token birxillash, mobil jadval scroll
goals.evidence: index.html Inter link olib tashlandi (hech qayerda ishlatilmasdi); ChatLayout 20+ emerald #10b981/#d1fae5/#065f46/rgba(16,185,129,*) → var(--success)/color-mix; ProResult fallback'lar tozalandi; TeacherPanel analytics jadval overflow-x-auto

goals.title: Verifikatsiya
goals.evidence: 6 fayl: EmailVerify, AdminLogin, authStore, kelviq.css, landing.css, Landing.tsx, index.css, index.html, ChatLayout, ProResult, TeacherPanel
